scenarios.description: parse at-rule with block containing a property declaration exercises hasBlock=true and handleDeclarationBlock path in handleAtRule
scenarios.expectedResult: contentHandler.startAtRule and .declaration called for the property, then endAtRule and endDocument
pseudocode: TEST TC10 parse at-rule with declaration in block

scenarios.description: parse ruleset where selector list factory returns null triggers early return path in handleRuleSet
scenarios.precondition: inject a stub CssSelectorConstructFactory that returns null for createSelectorList via reflection on CssParser instance
scenarios.expectedResult: contentHandler.startDocument and endDocument only, no selectors or declarations
pseudocode: TEST TC11 parse ruleset with null selectors
// Use reflection to replace parser.cssSelectorFactory with a stub whose createSelectorList returns null
